productDisplayName: Scullers Men Solid Navy Blue Trousers
description: Composition Navy blue full length  formal trousers made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, brand logo appliqued above the right hip pocket, metal zipper and button closure, and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron A famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and scullers makes it all the more easier with its classsy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of selected fabrics, it makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", waist-31"
